SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.descriptor

Class PersistenceHandler

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.descriptor.PersistenceHandler
public class PersistenceHandler extends Object
Core class of custom ORM framework. This class keeps the metadata about individual JPA entity. It honors all existing annotations of an entity, except "Join", which is the sole reason as to why this framework is ultra light. It avoids creating any complex object graph in the memory and does not maintain any state either.
Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

  • Constructor Details

    • PersistenceHandler

      private PersistenceHandler()

  • Method Details

    • get

      public static PersistenceHandler get()
      Return the single persistence handler object.
      Returns:
      PersistenceHandler

    • get

      public Object get(Object entity, String field)
      Convenient method to invoke the getter method of the entity. If the specified object is null or no setter method found, then this method returns null, indicating the method invocation failed.
      Parameters:
      entity - Object whose setter method to be invoked
      field - Field name whose value to be retrieved.
      Returns:
      Object Value of the field

    • set

      public boolean set(Object entity, String field, Object value)
      Convenient method to invoke the setter method of the specified object. If the specified object is null or no setter method found, then this method returns false, indicating the method invocation failed.
      Parameters:
      entity - Object whose setter method to be invoked
      field - Field name whose value is to be poppulated with 'value'.
      value - Value to be set in this field
      Returns:
      boolea True, means the successful invocation of setter API, False otherwise

    • pkGet

      public Object pkGet(ClassDescriptor desc, Object pk, String field)
      Convenient method to invoke the getter method of the primary key. Primary key of a jpa entity is ordinary pojo with no db mapping present. Hence the method details are stored against the java field name.
      Parameters:
      desc - Class descriptor.
      pk - Primary key whose getter method to be invoked
      field - Field name whose value to be retrieved.
      Returns:
      Object Value of the field

    • internalInvoke

      private static Object internalInvoke(Object entity, Method method, Object[] methodArgs)
      Here is where the actual invocation takes place
      Parameters:
      entity - Object whose method is to be invoked
      method - Method name
      methodArgs - Method arguments

    • copy

      public void copy(Object from, Object to)
      Copy all the property values from 'from' object to 'to' object.
      Parameters:
      from - Object the attributes will be copied from.
      to - Object where the copied attributes will be placed.

    • extractPrimaryKey

      public Object extractPrimaryKey(Object entity)
      Extract and populate the primary key object for this entity object.
      Parameters:
      entity - Entity whose primary key to be extracted
      Returns:
      Object Primary key object (typically the IdClass).

      Return the entity class metadata.

      entity -
      Returns:
